name: plugin-architect
description: Meta-plugin generator. Generates custom, codebase-focused plugins for AI coding tools.

interface.shortDescription: Generate a custom, codebase-focused plugin for any AI coding tool.
interface.longDescription: Plugin Architect analyzes your project and generates a structured, production-ready plugin for Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Gemini, opencode, or Codex — tailored to your actual tech stack.
defaultPrompt: plugin-architect is installed. When the user says 'build plugin', 'generate plugin', or 'set up plugin', read plugins/core/skills/build-plugin/SKILL.md and follow it exactly.
